mapper.select: SELECT * FROM customers ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT * FROM customers WHERE 1=1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND gender = #{gender}
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customers (name, gender, phone, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE customers SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM customers WHERE id = #{id}
